message:
fix(server/tui): hoist per-item lowercase allocations out of filter loops and fix contains_ci first-byte assumption

- archive_browser: precompute filter.to_lowercase() once per rebuild
  instead of per directory entry; also remove dead is_dir bypass so
  directories are filtered consistently
- attachments: hoist filter.to_lowercase() out of the per-entry closure
- explorer: replace sort_by_cached_key (allocates lowercased String per
  entry) with sort_by using cmp_ci for agent-alpha sort mode; remove
  redundant sync_list_state call before render
- search: precompute highlight needles once per search instead of per
  result row; replace str::matches() counting with explicit find-loop
  to avoid iterator allocation per needle
- system_health: add web-dashboard URL derivation from mail UI URL;
  rename "Web UI" labels to "Mail UI" throughout; describe Tailscale
  remote URL as usable by agents and CLI clients
- mod: fix contains_ci to always lowercase the first query byte rather
  than assuming the caller already lowered it

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
